### **Matrix and the Dialogic Logos**


_From Q-Forms to Conscious Experience_

![](https://diaspora.psyco.fr/uploads/images/bf0ad539230085edd081.webp)

✅ [Forever Tag](https://diaspora.psyco.fr/tags/trondiasporapsycofr_1762289208111) 📂 [Main Folder](https://diaspora.psyco.fr/tags/trondiasporapsycofr_aquinas) 📂 [Group Folder](https://diaspora.psyco.fr/tags/philosophy)

Courtesy of [**The Lady**](https://diaspora.psyco.fr/tags/trondiasporapsycofr_1745558058926)

![](https://diaspora.psyco.fr/uploads/images/106718ba5a84baf0f80c.webp)

**In the Matrix**, the physical field is the vectorial force in potency that, through the actualization of Q-forms, allows the emergence of Q-pseudomaterial substances—structures capable of chemical and physical interactions, such as photons, quarks, and the like. These substances are potential signals, not forms in potency, and exist as raw Q-substances prior to any neuropsychic processing. Any fundamental physical structure is the actualization of its corresponding Q-form, which gives rise to the multiplicity of, in principle, measurable boundaries that define physical reality. When raw Q-pseudomaterial substances are transduced by sensory systems or the neuropsyche, they become Q-substances—constrained or partially actualized signals that may give rise to qualia, ideas, or bodily reflexes. Through this framework, values can be assigned to events in space–time, describing macroscopic phenomena or even the ontological significance of quantum-level entities.

Q-pseudomaterial substances are structures that exist in principle and carry the potential to become **conscious experience** through the senses. When processed by the neuropsyche, these structures become Q-substances—that is, modified signals en route to being grasped by the soul as actualized forms, experienced qualia, or the “ideas” and “essences” of reality. Each Q-substance participates in the Matrix, the relational field that constitutes reality as an interconnected web of forms and substances, potentials and actualized.

Through the Epistemic Bridge—understood as the **Dialogic Logos**—volitional entities, such as angels, human souls, and other conscious intelligences, communicate by actualizing potential structural forms (ideas, meanings, or relational possibilities) within the Matrix. These actualizations appear as successive, discrete events rather than continuous processes, reflecting the inherently relational and participatory nature of being. Non-volitional entities, by contrast, are entirely determined by the relational structures in which they are embedded, requiring no mediation to actualize their potential forms.

In TACE, the universe is thus understood as a dynamic interplay of forms and substances, where physical reality, conscious experience, and intelligences all participate within the Matrix. Q-forms provide the space–time force vectoriality that allows certain forms to become physical, while other forms remain purely immaterial, yet all contribute to the relational structure of being. Knowledge of reality is therefore not limited by sensory contingencies alone, but can be extended through intellectual inference, as every entity participates in the universal web of act and potency.

Have you already taken into account that everything is “immaterial,” and that what is usually called “material” is merely the effect arising from the interaction between two distinct kinds of immateriality?

The perception of something as “material” arises from the interaction—analogous to the interference or collision of two waves—between raw Q-pseudomaterial substances and souled Q-pseudomaterial substances—that is, signals or structures as processed by consciousness. In this interaction, stimuli from raw Q-pseudomaterial substances are transduced and partially constrained (rendered non-raw), giving rise to Q-substances, which may manifest as qualia, as ideas in consciousness, as neuropsychic bodily reflexes, or as combinations thereof.
